title: Dekker Attorneys: Experts in legal services
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Dekker Attorneys is a boutique law firm dedicated to its clients, tailored to meet all their needs and exceed their expectations.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Dekker Attorneys is a boutique law firm dedicated to its clients, tailored to meet all their needs and exceed their expectations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The firm was established by Imke Dekker in 2012 and is built on the traditional values of diligence, ethical behaviour, personal attention and honesty.","html":"The firm was established by Imke Dekker in 2012 and is built on the traditional values of diligence, ethical behaviour, personal attention and honesty."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Dekker Attorneys are based in Mossel Bay and conveniently situated at 49 Hofmeyr Street in Linkside. Their experienced and professional team provide exceptional service across the country, all with the client's best interests at heart."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ella Pieters recently joined the team and heads the litigation department of the firm. Ella has a Master’s Degree in Law, specialising in Criminal Law and Forensic Medicine.","html":"Ella Pieters recently joined the team and heads the litigation department of the firm. Ella has a Master’s Degree in Law, specialising in Criminal Law and Forensic Medicine."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The firm specialises in the following fields:","html":"The firm specialises in the following fields:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Deceased Estates and Estate planningCompassionate and respectful estate administration, ensuring your family and dependants are looked after, once you have passed away.• WillsSpecialising both in the drafting of Wills and understanding the unique needs and wants of their clients.• Property law / ConveyancingProviding specialised legal advice and conveyancing services across all sectors of the property market.• Criminal lawWith extensive experience in this field, they help navigate you through the stormy waters of your legal issues.• TrustsAssisting clients with the creation and administration of Trusts and managing of trust assets.• Estates under CuratorshipAssist with the management of Estates under Curatorship, where individuals are unable to take care of their own estates and/or affairs.• Family lawOffers the protection of the rights and interests of individuals and families, helping to navigate complex legal issues while providing support during emotionally challenging times, which include divorce proceedings and legal separations.• Contracts and agreementsPersonalised solutions for all legal contract and agreement needs, including the drawing up of Antenuptial Contracts to ensure the comfort of knowing you have avoided potential difficulties in the future.• Civil litigationProtecting and guiding clients through complex processes.Contact Dekker Attorneys on 044 690 5653 or email [email protected].","html":"• Deceased Estates and Estate planning
Compassionate and respectful estate administration, ensuring your family and dependants are looked after, once you have passed away.

• Wills
Specialising both in the drafting of Wills and understanding the unique needs and wants of their clients.

• Property law / Conveyancing
Providing specialised legal advice and conveyancing services across all sectors of the property market.

• Criminal law
With extensive experience in this field, they help navigate you through the stormy waters of your legal issues.

• Trusts
Assisting clients with the creation and administration of Trusts and managing of trust assets.

• Estates under Curatorship
Assist with the management of Estates under Curatorship, where individuals are unable to take care of their own estates and/or affairs.

• Family law
Offers the protection of the rights and interests of individuals and families, helping to navigate complex legal issues while providing support during emotionally challenging times, which include divorce proceedings and legal separations.

• Contracts and agreements
Personalised solutions for all legal contract and agreement needs, including the drawing up of Antenuptial Contracts to ensure the comfort of knowing you have avoided potential difficulties in the future.

• Civil litigation
Protecting and guiding clients through complex processes.

Contact Dekker Attorneys on 044 690 5653 or email [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
